description_long: This is a high-performance, gold-colored sports car with a sleek, aerodynamic body and aggressive styling. The car features a prominent rear wing spoiler, large air intakes, and a low, wide stance that emphasizes its speed-oriented design. The front end is sharply contoured with angular headlights and a sculpted hood, while the rear showcases a distinctive diffuser and dual exhaust outlets. The wheels are large, gold, and feature a five-spoke design, complementing the car's overall color scheme. The side profile reveals deep side skirts, a low roofline, and pronounced fender flares, all contributing to its dynamic appearance. The car's exterior is finished in glossy paint, with black racing stripes running along the center for added visual impact.
description: A gold, low-slung sports car with a large rear wing, black racing stripes, and five-spoke gold wheels, featuring aggressive aerodynamic styling and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large rear wing, dual exhausts, black racing stripe, and pronounced diffuser.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gold five-spoke wheels, deep side skirts, and the full length of the rear wing.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the angular headlights, sculpted hood, black racing stripe, and low, wide stance.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aerodynamic profile, gold wheels, and side mirrors.
